ops.title: Track P: cc-pool + cc-notes import flip
ops.description: One commit: fusekit pin bump + moved-package imports → daemonkit. Eviction (internal/daemon/server.go:405-449) → Takeover + drain.Simple + pre-gate ordering fix; control socket documented against trust.Policy; widget release job → release-app.yml uses: call; widget reloads ≥5min. Preserved: bundle IDs/team/profiles/cask tokens frozen (TCC), File Provider two-budget readiness + safe-teardown. cc-notes flips in a sibling commit. daemonkit v1.0.0 when this lands.

ops.text: cc-pool gate green + ccp doctor live + one observed upgrade
TCC identity continuity: no notification/FDA re-prompts after upgrade
cc-notes flip commit green under go.work before the deleting fusekit release is tagged
